Thanks for contributing to Knowledge Lake!
Please fill out the sections below. PRs that don't pass CI or omit tests/docs
for behavior changes may be asked for updates.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123, Refs #456 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / chore / CI

## How was this tested?

<!-- Commands run, new tests added, manual verification steps. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
- [ ] `make lint` passes.
- [ ] `make typecheck` passes.
- [ ] `make test-unit` passes (and integration/e2e where relevant).
- [ ] I added or updated tests covering my change.
- [ ] I updated documentation (`README.md` / `docs/` / `CHANGELOG.md`) as needed.
- [ ] I respected the framework invariants (LiteLLM-only LLM calls, immutable raw
      zone, lineage preserved, tool-agnostic design, robots/license compliance).
- [ ] I did not commit secrets or generated artifacts.
